name: finflow-tracker-monorepo
description: FinFlow Tracker - Monorepo housing FastAPI backend and React frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npx kill-port 3000 && node frontend/server.js"
scripts.clean-dev: concurrently "npm run clean-dev --workspace=frontend" "npx kill-port 3000 && node frontend/server.js"
